text: The dark corridor and glass doors evoke a feeling of strangeness and slight unease—there is a barrier between me and what lies beyond. Moving forward, I encounter a wall filled with concepts of research and development, and I sense a flicker of curiosity. Yet the projected words about confusion and blurred perception resonate with my own experience: my vision feels fragmented, as if clarity is just out of reach. I am reminded of how perception is always partial, forever shifting with the light and the mind’s own restlessness.
